CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Next Generation ACO (NGACO) — Beneficiary File
Version — May 2025
SAS Name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
ACO_ID ACO identifier CHAR 4
BIRTH_DT Date of Birth NUM 8
DEATH_DT Date of Death NUM 8
SEX_CD Sex CHAR 1
M01_ALIGN Month 1 Alignment Flag NUM 1
M02_ALIGN Month 2 Alignment Flag NUM 1
M03_ALIGN Month 3 Alignment Flag NUM 1
M04_ALIGN Month 4 Alignment Flag NUM 1
M05_ALIGN Month 5 Alignment Flag NUM
